name: twins are a symmetric sibling edge, mirrored onto the other twin
description: The twin half of the four-daughters discrepancy: 'Lydian and Elora are identical twin girls' came back as an `attribute` (twinStatus) on Lydian whose VALUE was the whole sentence — so Elora carried nothing and the value rendered as prose instead of an edge. v10 teaches that a relationship between two named people is a `sibling` relationship edge (qualifier 'twin'), never a sentence-valued attribute; the pipeline then materializes the symmetric reciprocal on Elora's stream. The model emits only the one directed edge.

steps.body: Lydian and Elora are identical twin girls.

facts.statement: Lydian and Elora are identical twin sisters.
